memory.description: Persistent knowledge graph across sessions — store experiment results, decisions, domain facts

context7.description: Up-to-date library docs — pandas, torch, sklearn, rdkit, backtrader, etc.

brave-search.description: Web search — papers, market news, chemical databases, Stack Overflow

jupyter.description: Execute Python in a running Jupyter kernel — start kernel with: jupyter lab --no-browser

duckdb.description: DuckDB SQL — query parquet/CSV datasets, attach files, run analytical SQL. Start in-memory; use ATTACH for project files.

github.description: GitHub — create issues, manage PRs, track experiments as comments, browse repo

openproject.description: OpenProject — work packages, tasks, projects, time tracking, sprints

serena.description: Code navigation — symbol search, go-to-definition, cross-file refactoring via LSP
